titleEn: Dr. Jianlin Si elected USAPEEC chairman
contentHtml:
TUCKER, Ga. — The USA Poultry & Egg Export Council has elected Dr. Jianlin Si, Tyson Foods senior director of sales, as its Chairman of the Board for 2026-2027 during […]
The post Dr. Jianlin Si elected USAPEEC chairman first appeared on poultrytimes.com.
